comment.body:
mmm, be careful with this.
there are times when one cannot be sure, what the market wants. 
i also had this period, and will have.
market isn't always clear, sometimes you have to sit back, stay out of trading and just observe from the sideline and wait.

ooor.. if you have the inner urge to trade, then you estimate probability, and adjust your position sizes to the estimated % probs.
like in a log optimalized portfolio model i thouched in the "fair bet" educational post.
i will talk abotu that more, and also the real risk of the skewness.

he is a high lvl knowledge man relatively. his fund can be down due to sizing issues not necessary due to bad calls.
it is one thing to predict a market move and other to trade on it

comment.body:
and other problem is that vol effects the delta and gamma (vanna and zomma effects).
so you might been calculated a nice hedge ratio for your stock position, but if vol gets bid on a certain tenor, your option's convexity changes and will react differently to the underlying movements, and won't necessary work the way you expected.
comment.raw_body:
and other problem is that vol effects the delta and gamma (vanna and zomma effects).
so you might been calculated a nice hedge ratio for your stock position, but if vol gets bid on a certain tenor, your option's convexity changes and will react differently to the underlying movements, and won't necessary work the way you expected.

comment.body:
Hi Alma, I have a question about Friday. We knew that at 6080 (where vol must decrease to break through), there was the zero Vanna, however, At 16:00 as the data came out, the mkt pushed lower fast toward zero speed area with increased vol.
At the same time in that area (6075 zero speed), we knew before that volatility would have increased since we were at the critical zero speed point. (🎯)
So the data was just a pretext to shuffle the cards and increase volatility?
How do you interpret this dynamic, I am trying to understand didactically the mechanism happened.  

correct me if I’m wrong.

comment.body: The dynamics around zero vanna vs vol
comment.raw_body: The dynamics around zero vanna vs vol

comment.body:
in very simplified terms for now:
what is vanna? delta change to vol.
positive vanna = positive correlation (vol up/delta up, vol down/delta down)
negative vanna = negative relationship (vol up/delta down, vol down/delta up)

if something goes from positive to negative and vice versa, it must have a zero too.
thats the flip point.

if we are in positive vanna regime, it also means positive speed, where MMs short downside gamma+vega, and long upside gamma+vega
(bcs vanna is vega convexity too, vega change to spot, the delta of vega)
Now, in this regime if spot moves down, MMs are shorter vol, so they buy vol, bidding up IV
20-22delta strikes.

logical: vol up/delta up... if dealers are longer delta, they must sell futs, that increases vol.
also bcs it is shorter donwisde gamma so less resistance from gamma = more vol.
comment.raw_body:

positive vanna = positive correlation (vol up/delta up, vol down/delta down)
negative vanna = negative relationship (vol up/delta down, vol down/delta up)

if something goes from positive to negative and vice versa, it must have a zero too.
thats the flip point.

if we are in positive vanna regime, it also means positive speed, where MMs short downside gamma+vega, and long upside gamma+vega
(bcs vanna is vega convexity too, vega change to spot, the delta of vega)
Now, in this regime if spot moves down, MMs are shorter vol, so they buy vol, bidding up IV
20-22delta strikes.

logical: vol up/delta up... if dealers are longer delta, they must sell futs, that increases vol.
also bcs it is shorter donwisde gamma so less resistance from gamma = more vol.

comment.body:
when spot reaches zero vanna line (that is not a stationary line but an oscillating territory),
it all shifts.
now vanna works reversely.
so the higher the vol, the lower the delta will be pushed

when spot reaches zero vanna line (that is not a stationary line but an oscillating territory),

user.name: Alma
user.bio: Privat investor & speculator | Mathematics | Self-made quant | Market researcher | Options and Futures trader

comment.body:
this is the mechanical dynamics.
if an anomaly happens, that volatility gets dumped at the zero vanna territory, where it switches from positive to negative, then the lower the vol the higher the delta in negative vanna territory, MMs remain longer delta = selling
comment.raw_body:
